'''pazobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yohimbine|yohimbine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yohimbine|yohimbine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pazobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzebeth|pæzebeth]] || [[word:pæzebej|pæzebej]] || [[word:pæzebesh|pæzebesh]] || [[word:pæzebe|pæzebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazozoboth|pazozoboth]] || [[word:pazozoboj|pazozoboj]] || [[word:pazozobosh|pazozobosh]] || [[word:pazozobo|pazozobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazoboth|pazoboth]] || [[word:pazoboj|pazoboj]] || [[word:pazobosh|pazobosh]] || [[word:pazobo|pazobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazofboth|pazofboth]] || [[word:pazofboj|pazofboj]] || [[word:pazofbosh|pazofbosh]] || [[word:pazofbof|pazofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazobotho|pazobotho]] || [[word:pazobojo|pazobojo]] || [[word:pazobosho|pazobosho]] || [[word:pazoboko|pazoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazoboth|pazoboth]] || [[word:pazoboj|pazoboj]] || [[word:pazobosh|pazobosh]] || [[word:pazobo|pazobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazobothol|pazobothol]] || [[word:pazobojol|pazobojol]] || [[word:pazoboshol|pazoboshol]] || [[word:pazobokol|pazobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazobothotho|pazobothotho]] || [[word:pazobojojo|pazobojojo]] || [[word:pazoboshosho|pazoboshosho]] || [[word:pazoboko|pazoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazobothon|pazobothon]] || [[word:pazobojon|pazobojon]] || [[word:pazoboshon|pazoboshon]] || [[word:pazobokon|pazobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazobothoro|pazobothoro]] || [[word:pazobojoro|pazobojoro]] || [[word:pazoboshoro|pazoboshoro]] || [[word:pazobokoro|pazobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
